info.name: BreachLens API v1
info.description:
Complete test suite for BreachLens - COM661 CW1.

Covers: Auth (Login), Breach CRUD, Affected Accounts, Timeline, Remediation, Monitoring Alerts, Geospatial, Analytics, Exposure Check, Users, Admin.

Uses seeded test data (seed_data.py) - no registration needed.

Security: All credentials read from Postman Environment variables only. Set adminEmail, adminPassword, analystEmail, analystPassword in your environment.

exec: // Auto JWT Injection -- reads credentials from environment variables ONLY.
// Set adminEmail, adminPassword, analystEmail, analystPassword in Postman Environment.
// NO credentials are hardcoded in this collection.
if (!email || !pass) { console.warn('[BreachLens] ' + role + ' credentials not set in environment.'); return; }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }
pm.test('Returns _id, email, role', () => { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property('_id'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('email'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('role'); });

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

pm.test('Each breach has severity and status', () => { pm.response.json().data.forEach(b => { pm.expect(b.severity).to.be.oneOf(['critical','high','medium','low','informational']); pm.expect(b.status).to.be.oneOf(['active','contained','investigating','resolved']); }); });

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }
pm.test('risk_score descending', () => { const s=pm.response.json().data.map(b=>b.risk_score); for(let i=0;i<s.length-1;i++) pm.expect(s[i]).to.be.at.least(s[i+1]); });

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

pm.test('Feature schema', () => { const f=pm.response.json().data.features; if(f.length>0){ pm.expect(f[0].type).to.equal('Feature'); pm.expect(f[0].geometry.type).to.equal('Point'); pm.expect(f[0].geometry.coordinates).to.be.an('array').with.lengthOf(2); pm.expect(f[0].properties).to.have.property('id'); } });

if (pm.response.code >= 400) { pm.test('Error envelope has status+message+code', function(){ const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('status','error'); pm.expect(j).to.have.property('message').that.is.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(j).to.have.property('code', pm.response.code); }); }

pm.test('Has nested users/breaches/alerts structure', () => { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d).to.have.property('users').that.is.an('object'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('breaches').that.is.an('object'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('alerts').that.is.an('object'); pm.expect(d.users).to.have.property('total').that.is.a('number'); pm.expect(d.users).to.have.property('by_role').that.is.an('object'); pm.expect(d.users).to.have.property('active').that.is.a('number'); pm.expect(d.users).to.have.property('inactive').that.is.a('number'); pm.expect(d.breaches).to.have.property('total').that.is.a('number'); pm.expect(d.breaches).to.have.property('by_status').that.is.an('object'); pm.expect(d.breaches).to.have.property('by_severity').that.is.an('object'); pm.expect(d.alerts).to.have.property('total').that.is.a('number'); pm.expect(d.alerts).to.have.property('unacknowledged').that.is.a('number'); });
